summary: Completed frontend testing of new Turkish blog page 'Nasırda Siyah Noktalar Neden Oluşur? Tehlikeli mi?'. Core functionality works correctly but SEO meta tags have integration issues.

seo_issues.issue: react-helmet meta tags not rendering properly - meta description shows 'A product of emergent.sh' instead of proper description
seo_issues.impact: SEO optimization not working, social media sharing will not show proper preview

passed_tests: New blog page loads correctly at /blog/nasirda-siyah-noktalar
Blog post appears first in blog list
Internal links added to NasirSigilBlog.jsx work correctly
Internal links added to NasirNedenTekrarlarBlog.jsx work correctly
FAQ accordion opens and closes properly
WhatsApp CTA button opens in new tab
Page title displays correctly in browser tab
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix react-helmet integration issue - SEO meta tags (description, OG tags, Twitter cards, canonical URL) are not being rendered properly. The Helmet component appears to be configured correctly in the code but meta tags are being overridden or not applied.
